LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JAVIS JONES - MR. JONES WAS GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE WITHIN 10 DAYS HIS AMENDED CLAIM BY MARKING THE PROPER BOX IN THE FORM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321
